name: Session Creation API
summary: Backend API for creating and initializing new agent sessions
goals: Create and persist agent session records
Initialize session state and model configuration

specDetail.description: Exposes POST /api/agents/sessions endpoint that creates a new agent session. Validates model availability, initializes conversation state, and returns the session object.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project to associate the session with (required)

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: AI model ID to use for the session (required)

constraints: Must validate modelId against the list of available and enabled models
Must return 404 if the associated project does not exist
Must initialize conversation history as empty on creation

acceptanceCriteria.then: a new session is created with unique ID and returned with status 201

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
